title: SynthID, our imperceptible watermark for AI-generated content, is expanding to more partners.
summary: SynthID is an imperceptible watermark technology for AI-generated content developed by Google DeepMind. The tool is expanding to more partners, indicating growing adoption and integration into third-party systems.
